sms.body: let's actually try. really try this time

sms.subject: null
sms.body: i don't know how to reach you lately

sms.subject: null
sms.body: i feel invisible in my own house

sms.subject: null
sms.body: this is the third time this month

sms.subject: null
sms.body: why is it always me doing everything around here

sms.subject: null
sms.body: i am so angry i can't even talk right now

sms.subject: null
sms.body: i'm done having the exact same fight over and over

sms.subject: null
sms.body: my bad for snapping. you didn't deserve it

sms.subject: null
sms.body: i was wrong. i should have asked instead of assuming

sms.subject: null
sms.body: we got there in the end

sms.subject: null
sms.body: i booked us a session with a counselor for next week

sms.subject: null
sms.body: i love you

sms.subject: null
sms.body: you and me and biscuit. that's the whole plan

sms.subject: null
sms.body: i choose you, even on the hard days

sms.subject: null
sms.body: you and me and biscuit. that's the whole plan

sms.subject: null
sms.body: got the tickets for saturday

sms.subject: null
sms.body: thank you for hearing me

sms.subject: null
sms.body: i know this year's been hard. i still want it, with you

sms.subject: null
sms.body: ok. truce — dinner and a movie?

sms.subject: null
sms.body: let's actually try. really try this time

sms.subject: null
sms.body: in a meeting, call you after

sms.subject: null
sms.body: the store was out of the good bread

sms.subject: null
sms.body: i booked us a session with a counselor for next week

sms.subject: null
sms.body: i know this year's been hard. i still want it, with you

sms.subject: null
sms.body: we got there in the end

sms.subject: null
sms.body: gonna hit the gym after

sms.subject: null
sms.body: so lucky to have you

sms.subject: null
sms.body: good morning babe ☀️

sms.subject: null
sms.body: thanks for staying in it with me

sms.subject: null
sms.body: goodnight, love you ❤️

sms.subject: null
sms.body: i choose you, even on the hard days

sms.subject: null
sms.body: love waking up next to you

sms.subject: null
sms.body: i don't want to lose this. lose us

sms.subject: null
sms.body: let's actually try. really try this time

sms.subject: null
sms.body: you want the usual from the thai place?

sms.subject: null
sms.body: had the best day with you

sms.subject: null
sms.body: let's actually try. really try this time
